nasb.text: The sons of Benjamin according to their families: of Bela, the family of the Belaites; of Ashbel, the family of the Ashbelites; of Ahiram, the family of the Ahiramites;

esv.text: The sons of Benjamin according to their clans: of Bela, the clan of the Belaites; of Ashbel, the clan of the Ashbelites; of Ahiram, the clan of the Ahiramites;

cnv.text: 便雅憫的子孫，按著家族，屬比拉的，有比拉家族；屬亞實別的，有亞實別家族；屬亞希蘭的，有亞希蘭家族；

ccb.text: 便雅悯的子孙有比拉族、亚实别族、亚希兰族、
